summary: Tested merged Filter & Spec Assignment functionality into Navigation & Structure page. All features working correctly: Filters tab shows all filters with Visible/Hidden toggle buttons when a product group is selected, Specifications tab shows all specs with toggle buttons, toggle APIs work correctly, standalone /admin/filter-assignment route removed, WebsiteHub card removed.

Filters tab shows ALL filters with toggl.details: 16 filters displayed with Visible toggle buttons when Tiles group selected

Visible/Hidden toggle button appears whe.details: Each filter shows Visible button with eye icon, changes to Hidden with EyeOff when toggled

PATCH /api/filters/types/{id}/toggle-typ.details: API correctly adds/removes product_group from hidden_groups array

Hidden filter styling (dashed border, re.details: Hidden filters show with 'Hidden' label and different styling

Specifications tab shows toggle buttons.details: 8 specifications displayed with Visible toggle buttons

PATCH /api/specifications/types/{id}/tog.details: API correctly adds/removes product_group from hidden_groups array for specs

Standalone /admin/filter-assignment rout.details: Route redirects to homepage (catch-all route), not found in App.js

Filter & Spec Assignment hub card remove.details: Card not present in WebsiteHub, Navigation & Structure card exists instead

Product group selector works.details: Dropdown shows all groups (All Groups, Tiles, Flooring, Materials, Tools, Accessories, Underfloor Heating), switching updates displayed filters/specs

Toast notifications on toggle.details: Shows 'Color hidden from Tiles' / 'Material shown in Tiles' etc.

seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - existing filter_types and specification_types collections used
context_for_next_testing_agent: Filter & Spec visibility toggle functionality has been merged into Navigation & Structure page (/admin/navigation-structure). The standalone /admin/filter-assignment route no longer exists. Toggle buttons appear in Filters and Specifications tabs when a specific product group is selected (not 'All Groups'). The same APIs are used by SupplierProducts BulkCategoryEditor.
